description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building surrounded by lush greenery and trees, with a prominent driveway leading to the main entrance. The structure features a modern, flat-roof design with clean lines and a mix of brick and concrete materials. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing for ample natural light. The property is bordered by rows of trees, providing privacy and a sense of enclosure. A small porch area is visible at the front, offering a welcoming entryway. The overall layout is compact yet spacious, with landscaped lawns and paved walkways integrated into the design.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, brick and concrete exterior, surrounded by trees and landscaped lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, and a small porch area framed by trees and greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the dense tree border and the asymmetrical window placement along the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, additional windows, and the continuation of the tree-lined property boundary.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat roof, side lawn, and the driveway extending to the street.
